careTasks.title: Divide & repot
careTasks.description: Split root ball into 2-3 sections and pot each separately.

careTasks.title: Watering day
careTasks.description: Regular scheduled watering. Use room-temperature water.

careTasks.title: Root check & refresh
careTasks.description: Inspect roots for rot, trim as needed, refresh soil.

careTasks.title: Stake for support
careTasks.description: Add a stake or moss pole to support climbing growth.

careTasks.title: Rotate for even light
careTasks.description: Turn pot 90° for even sun exposure on all sides.

careTasks.title: Boost with nitrogen
careTasks.description: Apply nitrogen-rich fertilizer to encourage leafy growth.

careTasks.title: Water thoroughly
careTasks.description: Water until it drains from the bottom. Check soil moisture first.

careTasks.description: Inspect roots for rot, trim as needed, refresh soil.

careTasks.title: Repot to larger container
careTasks.description: Move to a pot 2 inches larger. Use fresh potting mix.

careTasks.title: Pinch back growth tips
careTasks.description: Pinch new growth to encourage bushier, fuller plant.

careTasks.title: Foliar feeding

careTasks.title: Remove dead leaves
careTasks.description: Cut off yellowing or brown leaves at the base with clean scissors.
